generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst with 20 years in the field, I can tell you: the current security powers debate isn't about 'big brother' - it's about keeping up with evolving threats. We've seen what happens when agencies are handcuffed. The 2024 Mumbai-style attack attempt was only stopped because we had the tools to connect the dots fast. Civil liberties matter, but so does being prepared. #NationalSecurityFirst #LearnFromHistory
